_meta.description: Sponsored Products campaign-level negative keywords. Daily snapshot — every fire upserts the full current set. Sourced via Ads-API v3 paginated POST /sp/campaignNegativeKeywords/list. Campaign-level negatives apply to ALL ad groups within the campaign — distinct from rpt_sp_negative_keywords (ad-group scope). Pair both for full-coverage negation lookup.

columns.comment: Amazon Ads profile id; one row set per (profile, snapshot_date).

columns.note: Marketplace this ads row belongs to. Query ads data per (store, country_code) directly — no need to reverse-map profile_id.

columns.comment: Marketplace-local date the snapshot was captured.
Server-side timestamp the row was UPSERTed.
Amazon's keyword identifier — distinct namespace from ad-group keyword negatives.
Campaign id this negative scopes to.
Locale string Amazon ships with the negative.
Any Amazon response fields not promoted to a typed column.
